tagline.en: Red means GO -- pick and eat!
tagline.da: Roed betyder KOM -- pluk og spis!

tasks.action: Pick first ripe strawberries from Bed A

prompt.en: Only pick the RED ones -- leave the white ones for tomorrow! How many did you get?
prompt.da: Pluk kun de ROEDE -- lad de hvide sidde til i morgen! Hvor mange fik du?

prompt.en: Strawberries need steady water now that they're fruiting!
prompt.da: Jordbaer har brug for jaevn vanding nu, hvor de saetter frugt!

tasks.action: Harvest second-batch radishes from Bed C (sown W18)

prompt.en: Pull and taste -- are these different from the first ones?
prompt.da: Traek og smag -- er de her anderledes end de foerste?

prompt.en: Look for little yellow star flowers on the tomato -- each one becomes a tomato!
prompt.da: Kig efter smaa gule stjerneblomster paa tomaten -- hver en bliver til en tomat!

tasks.action: Cut first lettuce harvest from Bed C

prompt.en: Cut the outer leaves with scissors -- leave the middle so it grows back!
prompt.da: Klip de yderste blade med en saks -- lad midten staa, saa den gror igen!

prompt.en: The green berries are turning RED! Each red one is ready to eat right now!
prompt.da: De groenne baer bliver ROEDE! Hvert roedt er klar til at spise lige nu!

growth_events.event: Cucumber starting to climb the trellis

prompt.en: The cucumber is grabbing the trellis with its tendrils -- just like the peas did!
prompt.da: Agurken griber espalieren med sine snoetraade -- ligesom aerterne!
